title: Schema Validator y schemas de contratos transversales
wave: Ola 1 — Consolidación contractual y Schema Engine

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-22 introduces jsonschema as a runtime dependency to validate JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 contracts.

commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema EvidenceReport --instance outputs/reports/schema_list.json --json
pass_criteria: Valid JSON instances pass their registered schemas.
Invalid JSON instances produce actionable findings.
JSON parse errors are converted to CommandResult without uncontrolled stacktraces.
jsonschema dependency is documented by ADR-0010.
No network, external API or API key is required.
block_criteria: A dependency is added without ADR.
Documentation overstates structural validation as semantic validation.
risks: JSON Schema validation is structural and does not replace business rules.
Initial schemas are permissive and require future hardening.
The new jsonschema dependency must be maintained below major version 5 until reviewed.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-23 — Schemas MIASI, Workspace, Providers y Sprint Manifests
